name: No Naked Returns
description: Naked returns in long functions with named return values make code harder to reason about and are a frequent source of bugs.
rationale: Naked returns implicitly use named return values, which makes it easy to accidentally return stale or unintended values — especially in long functions where the assignment may be far from the return statement. Explicit returns make the data flow clear.

params.description: Minimum function length to flag naked returns
